title: Severen Demo
description: Playing across 10+ full levels with interchangeable limbs that allow for new abilities and secret paths to be found. The full game will feature an overworld full of puzzles and NPC areas to explore as well as the main levels the game will play similarly to Deadeus with multiple endings, just with a more action oriented platformer style.

title: Deadeus
description:
This horror game has already received a lot of fanfare in the retro gaming community, so we are happy to have the opportunity to help get it into more hands!

Deadeus is an authentic horror Gameboy game developed using Chris Maltby’s GB Studio engine, featuring music by Stuart Busby. The game centers around a small boy who has a prophetic nightmare telling him everyone will die in 3 days and that he has to investigate his village to see how he can save them, if at all. It has 11 endings and no direct path leaving it up to the player to decide which is the best course of action.

title: Aaling The Ghost
description: Aaling’s life is taken away due to the Nether World’s bureaucratic mistake. After her appeal was neglected, she decides to escape from the Nether World. Soon she learns that the only way to retrieve her life is to seek help from the Queen Mother of the West, an enigmatic goddess who lives on the Kunlun Mountain. Not knowing its exact location, Aaling has only seven days to arrive at the sacred mountain before she vanishes. An adventure full of mysteries, curious encounters, and dives into the unknown has begun, with temptations, threats, and dangers lurking in all directions…

title: Dracula DARK REIGN
description:
Dracula - Dark Reign is an Official StokerVerse™ Game and is developed under license from The StokerVerse™ Project.
It is the first-ever Stoker family-authorized Dracula video game!

The game features a unique prologue drawn from Bram Stoker’s personal notes, introducing elements never before seen in any medium. Players will relive Jonathan Harker’s daring escape from Castle Dracula, capturing a pivotal moment that has intrigued Dracula enthusiasts for generations.​

title: Dragonym
description: For a number of years after the age-old conflict with dragons came to a head, the people of Archend have enjoyed an era of peace. All was well until the esteemed Yhmszindr, Kurtis, went missing, and the sealed dragons began to awaken.​

title: The Mirror Between Us
description:
'When did it go wrong? I remember a time where everything was alright...'


Guide this couple through the puzzles - Love may not have forsaken them yet...
cover_image_alt: Promotional image for The Mirror Between Us

title: Fix My Heart
description:
Fix My Heart is a precision platformer with minimalistic graphics and a strong emphasis on speedrunning, ranked 16th out of 134 entries in the Game Boy Competition 2021.

Run through a perilous cave as you try to fix your mechanical heart. The game offers challenging levels that will push your platforming abilities to the limit, leaving no room for errors. Are you up for the challenge?

With seven unique endings to unlock, you must decide your fate and confront the cave's deadly obstacles. For those seeking an even harder experience, the Remix mode introduces five new gameplay mechanics that will put your skills to the test.

title: Agent B
description: TBD

title: 1bit Game Collection
description: TBD

title: Black Castle 2
description:
Years ago, the knight Aric defeated the sinister warlock Malakar in the Black Castle. But the victory was deceptive: Malakar survived, hidden in the shadows, and gathered new powers. Now he is back and stronger than ever.

With a ritual, he wants to plunge the world into eternal night. He has chosen Lyra, Aric's sister, as his sacrifice. Aric swears revenge. With his old blade, he sets off once again for the Black Castle...

title: G-Zero World GP
description: It is the year 2560. We were able to defend ourselves against an alien attack, but  also suffered great losses. To celebrate the day of victory, a race is held every 4 years, the G-ZERO World Grand Prix! Only the best pilots are allowed to compete in the race and never-ending glory awaits the winner...
cover_image_alt: Promotional image for G-Zero World GP

title: Gunship DX
description: Our nation is under attack by enemy forces and the defense can only succeed with the help of air ground support. The futur of our nation depends on you! Fight your way through five missions to repel the attack and restore peace.

title: Genesis 2
description: When the evil AI GENESIS was defeated, a small part of the source code escaped and hid on an asteroid. Unnoticed, GENESIS gathered new energy and is now stronger than ever, ready to attack earth again and wipe out all live...

title: Gunship
description: Our nation is under attack by enemy forces and the defense can only succeed with the help of air ground support. The future of our nation depends on you! Fight your way through five missions to repel the attack and restore peace.

title: G-Zero
description:
It is the year 2560. We were able to defend ourselves against an alien attack, but  also suffered great losses. To celebrate the day of victory, a race is held every 4 years, the G-ZERO Grand Prix! Only the best pilots are allowed to compete in the race and never-ending glory awaits the winner...

G-ZERO is a simple, arcade like racing game for the Gameboy. It was inspired by a F-Zero pixelart demake from Miguel Sanchez. In each race you have to complete two laps. To win the G-ZERO Grand Prix, you must finish six races in first place.

Your racer has a limited power, which decreases when you touch the track's rail or other drivers. If the power is used up, you can't continue and the race is lost.

title: Genesis
description:
The year is 2120, Earth has been attacked by an evil AI. One single fighter has broken through the ferocious siege, fight your way through hordes of enemies to reach the main processor of Genesis and destroy it. The future of mankind depends on you...

Fight your way through 4 action packed levels, collect shields, energy, and power-ups from enemy remains and test your agility to dodge enemy fire, to reach the boss fight at the end of each level.

Can you overcome the evil invasion of GENESIS?

title: Black Castle
description:
The times were dark and the kingdom was threatened by a black warlock. His evil magic brought disease and destruction to the land, but none of the king's knights found the courage to fight him. One day a young knight appeared. He set out for the warlock's black castle to free the kingdom from his tyranny.

Fight your way through four exciting levels, find secret passages, hidden items and defeat the black warlock.

title: MICROGAMES Jam Pak
description: TBD
cover_image_alt: Promotional image for MICROGAMES Jam Pak

title: GB Jammers
description: Let's be real, participating in a game jam can be a lot of work. Sometimes it's just easier to play a very loose simulation of a game jam instead. Collect game assets (in the form of cards), create your ideal tech stack (by building a deck), and [auto] battle your way through increasingly competitive game jams. Can you become the ultimate GB Jammer?

title: Ningami 2
description: Ningami 2 is a deck builder board game with 4 unique characters to play as, and 3 different board types to play through. (Plus maybe even a secret 4th board type???) The game is honestly pretty self explanatory, but here are a few helpful tips for some not immediately obvious things:

title: Double Dyad
description: Double Dyad is basically Triple Triad, but for the Gameboy. The deep lore has something to do with ghosts turning into robots or something. I dunno. You'll have to piece it together on your own--like Dark Souls. It's the Dark Souls of Triple Triad demakes on the Gameboy.

title: Logue
description: TBD

title: Buddy Book Battle
description:
I didn't have time to fit the story in the game, so here it is: there exists a magical race of beings called buddies. Through the use of spellbooks, they can use powerful magic. However, they can't actually read their own books. They have to partner up with a human who can read their book. Further, in order to draw out the full potential of each book, the buddy and human pair have to have a strong bond. And the best way to deepen their bonds is through combat.

One day, a buddy named Paige suggested to her group of friends that they should hold a friendly battle royale in order to increase the bonds with their partners and strengthen the group as a whole...

(Yes, I stole this directly from Zatch Bell lol. Also, other than the player calling out commands during battle, the human partners aren't directly represented in the game. I didn't have the dev bandwidth for that. Small indie dev, please understand.)

- Bownly
cover_image_alt: Promotional image for Buddy Book Battle

title: GB Paint
description: Draw up to 16 8x8 pictures using the full  range of the Gameboy's expansive 4 color palette. You can even save your creations using the battery save.

title: Tobu Tobu Bōzu
description:
The year is Neo New Kyoto. Happiness is a rare commodity in this dreary cyberpunk dystopia. Faced with a ceaseless rain, it's up to a lone teru teru bōzu to ward off the downpour. The only method being to platform up to the top of the labyrinthian amalgamation of various buildings that mars the skyline, and hang from the tallest eaves in the city.

Can the future be saved? No, of course not. But perhaps, by your actions, you can help to provide some much needed sunlight to the disheveled masses. Your mission--much like the lives of the struggling Neo New Kyotoites--will be short and difficult.
cover_image_alt: Promotional image for Tobu Tobu Bōzu

title: Ningami
description: Assume the role of a ninja undergoing the trial to become a ningami master. Craft your own unique deck, defeat origami foes, and master the ancient art of ningami.

title: Magipanels
description: Magipanels is a modern take on the match 3 genre that feels right at home on the Nintendo Game Boy. Manipulate panels on the grid one column or row at a time to form matches and earn a high score, while utilizing character specific abilities to radically alter the grid in your favour!

title: Kien
description:
Discover the Secret of Kien! For 7,000 years the planet of Malkut has been wisely ruled by the 7 Masters of the Absolute. But chaos has been reborn as evil corrupts the Land of Harmony. The 7 Masters have vanished, mystical warriors were slaughtered, and the temples are doomed in blood. The only hope that remains is imprisoned in the hearts and wills of two young apprentices. Their fate is to fight evil, reveal the truth, and discover the secret of Kien.

An enthralling action platformer infused with RPG elements, immersing adventures in a captivating fantasy world of 23 intricate and demanding levels. With Gameplay that maintains a relentless pace, throwing players into the midst of frenetic action where they must confront a multitude of adversaries. The distinctive non-linear structure grants you the freedom to explore Kien's expansive world as you choose; Journey from one stage to the next, making every playthrough a unique and captivating adventure.

title: Infinity
description: An ancient, nameless evil stirs beneath the earth, twisting the land and its people alike with its corrupting force. Two rival nations careen toward war, as a shadowy figure arms them both with unholy weapons of immense power. A disgraced knight is called upon to overcome the centuries-old pain that divides these peoples, his own grief, and the malevolent forces fanning the flames of hate. This epic tale frames a roleplaying game with a unique tactical battle system, 5 playable characters, a detailed world with over 30 explorable areas and more than 100 items, and beautiful 8-bit graphics — all to immerse you into the world of Infinity!

title: IndestructoTank!
description:
The world faces an insurmountable danger that it has never seen before. In desperation, Earth calls on a hero, and Dirk Danger answers the call, manning the mighty IndestructoTank, an… indestructible bouncing tank? He may not be the hero they wanted, but he’s certainly the hero they need.

IndestructoTank! is an arcade style game that seeks to bring the classic Flash game to your Game Boy, as you destructively bounce across helicopters, planes, and more, trying to score high combos and gather points to spend on upgrades. Hop into the IndestructoTank!, and get ready for a ride!

title: Hidden Gems
description:
Hidden Gems is a strategic card game for the Game Boy and Game Boy Color that challenges you to outsmart an adaptive AI opponent in a battle of wits and strategy.

Fuse gem cards and place them on a 4x4 board to achieve the highest score. With just three basic card types, the game offers endless possibilities through clever fusions and tactical placement. Whether you’re a casual gamer or a seasoned strategist, Hidden Gems is easy to learn but hard to master.

title: Dango Dash
description:
Ever since an unknown calamity destroyed the world, people live on islands floating in a vast sea of clouds. In a small village on one of these islands lives a young boy called Dango, who tries to find his place in life.

Dango Dash is a platformer adventure game that combines fast-paced action with an engaging story about growing up and fighting for what you believe in. Help Dango in his quest to save his village and defeat the evil Hanami ninja clan threatening their peace.

title: Narcotiendita
description: A horror short story to read on your Game Boy.

title: Solarpunk 3077
description:
In the Year 3077, civilization survived a climate catastrophe by living in a controlled city-state called Solaris.

 The city and its surroundings live in harmony with nature, although under constant threat by the malicious Gray Goo, a gigantic mass of nanomachines that multiply by eating everything in their way.

Trixy, a cadet of an elite group of pilots called the Sentinels, will keep Solaris and the planet safe from the Gray Goo!

title: Pine Creek
description:
The disappearance of a young girl in the previously quiet small town of Pine Creek raises the popular belief that a cult is behind the crime and many other ritual killings before her. 

Her best friend will do his best to solve why, how, and who is behind it.


PINE CREEK is an adventure game focused on exploration, story, and following clues. Have friends, think about life, think about death, eat tasty food, and play games in the arcade!

title: Slowly Fading into Data
description:
"Slowly Fading into Data" is an experimental narrative-driven, interactive-storytelling, action-adventure game (and a retro-synth!).

A contemplative story of a human, slowly mutating into data. A transformative journey about the meaning of being human, the boundaries of experience, existence and identity.

It is designed to be played more than once to discover all its hidden secrets, choices, easter eggs, and alternative endings. An intense cinematographic audiovisual experience that pushes your 8-bit perception and puts into test your exploration and philosophical skills.
cover_image_alt: Slowly Fading into Data Box and Cartridge

title: The Mayor of Sanctuary
description:
As Yuu, the former mayor of Anzen, you had hoped for a quiet retirement away from the hustle of civic life. However, the peace you sought is shattered when a wave of cursed spirits begin to emerge from the once tranquil forests of Sanctuary. It is now up to you to return to Anzen and connect with its inhabitants to unravel the mysteries behind the unrest.

Will you be able to uncover the sinister forces that lie beneath and restore harmony to Anzen? 

Embark on a journey of casual exploration through a large unique map, brimming with charming characters and captivating scenery. This leisurely experience offers mild combat, light puzzles, and hidden secrets waiting to be discovered.

IT IS ADVISED NOT TO BUY THE PHYSICAL RELEASE
cover_image_alt: Promotional image for The Mayor of Sanctuary

title: The Year After
description: An emotional Gameboy experience about an invisible stranger, a family and a brutal winter. Walk through time. Seasons pass. Characters age.

title: Bridget Bishop
description: TBD

title: Wing Warriors
description: Wing Warriors is a fast paced shoot ‘em up, featuring three playable characters that promote different strategies as you try to conquer the game’s six stages and three boss battles. The game also features a score saving feature, and is playable in English, French, and Spanish.

title: Zephyr's Pass
description:
Zephyr's Pass is a captivating, narrative-driven action-adventure game designed specifically for the GBC.

Set in a land tormented by destructive winds, the game's inhabitants are forced to live in canyons and travel via low-flying airships.

The story follows a young hero, Abel, who joins forces with a band of pirates to defeat Thane, a man striving to become the Wind God. To accomplish this, Abel must locate ancient pieces of armor, each granting him new abilities and the strength to save his land.

The game features rich, detailed visuals that surpass many other titles on the system, both homebrew, and official release. It offers challenging puzzles that vary up the dungeons you will explore, each featuring a unique mechanic to test the player.

The game's creators aim to provide an experience akin to the many great official releases for the GBC.

title: Hellbreaker
description:
Pre-release alpha demo of Hell Breaker, a new puzzle game for the Game Boy Color.
        
        Every century since the dawn of man a battle has taken place between Heaven and Hell over the souls that get lost between the realms. Each side nominates an angel to fight and the winner collects these souls for their side. 

In this, our year 20XX, dark angel Lilith enters the puzzle arena to battle light angel Muriel for the title of Hell Breaker.

title: Opossum Country
description: A story-driven horror game for Game Boy. Investigate a suspicious trailer park and uncover its secret horrors.

title: Decline
description: A story-driven horror game for Game Boy. Investigate a teacher's murder and deal with the effects of old age. The game features multiple endings based on decisions you make along the way.

title: The Last Employee DX
description:
A quick game that I made over the weekend for Mini Jam 42: SNOW

The constraint for the game was that it could use no more than two colors. I also made it in two days so it's a very binary game!
- BenJelter
cover_image_alt: Promotional image for The Last Employee DX

title: Game Boy color test utility
description:
I am providing a browser version as a demo but the real purpose is to put this palette editor on a Game Boy and test colors there to ensure that your palettes will work well. 

This utility can give you the rgb values to type into GB Studio's palette editor when you get a palette you like and it can even output a number for the color that can be used with Mico27's set palette color plug-in: https://github.com/Mico27/gbs-setPaletteColorPlugin
cover_image_alt: Promotional image for Game Boy color test utility

title: The Machine
description:
The Machine is a game about a little guy named Girt. Girt lives in the machine. The machine isn't perfect but it's the only thing Girt knows. Girt can choose any career he wants... as long as he has good enough test scores! By the way, Girt forgot to study for his tests. Good luck! :)

The Machine is a non-linear adventure where you can get different jobs, meet new characters, and try to survive inside the machine. As you progress along different career paths you can learn more about the world and unlock new careers by scoring higher on the test the next time you play. Your choices affect the direction the machine's society goes. If you rise through the ranks you can change the course of the machine's history.

I am calling the genre a 'pancake adventure' because the story tree is an experimental format where it is short but very wide so that on subsequent play-throughs things can be totally different. If you play through the demo a couple of times and make different decision you will start to see the flexibility of the story!

title: Metamorphosis Collection
description:
The Metamorphosis Collection contains three original horror games, linked together by the theme of transformation. Explore the depths of human psychology with these stories crafted by the award-winning game designer Ben Jelter.

Just be careful… as you play, you may find yourself transformed as well!

In Opossum Country, you play as a food delivery guy who needs to make a delivery at a trailer park. What seems like another day at work quickly unravels. Can he complete his delivery or will his curiosity lead to his ultimate demise?

In Decline, you play as an elderly police detective on the verge of retirement. Wrestling with cognitive decline, she attempts to solve the seemingly simple case. Though, things may not be as they seem as rumors spread about something called the ‘Glitch Witch’…

In Specimen 134, you play as a regular kid named Jason who starts to notice some very unusual things going on in his town. His friend David asks him if he wants to explore the woods but he might not like what he finds there…

title: First Contact Protocol
description:
First Contact Protocol (FCP) is a story about encountering alien life. It takes place on a monitor vessel that is tasked with ensuring the safety of a large interstellar spaceship called the Dia Modrona.

FCP is a story-driven adventure game. It features various environmental puzzles and a nonlinear story. By interacting with the puzzles and the crew in various ways, you can change the fate of the ship! The crew has different motivations that keep things interesting. You will have to interact with the ship's systems to get to one of the many endings.
cover_image_alt: First Contact Protocol Box and Cartridge

title: OrmBlok
description:
Ormblok is an arcade style falling block game with a twist. Use your blocks to create pellets in the playfield and then use the worm to eat the pellets! 

Each round the target goal increases dramatically. Can you make it to round 9? 

The game focuses on risk/reward with the things that can earn you the most points also being the riskiest things to try to do. You can learn optimal strategies for playing the game and get scores that are exponentially higher.

title: UNEARTHED 2024 EDITION
description:
Set in a future where humanity has all but depleted Earth's resources, UNEARTHED invites you on an interstellar journey with Max - a husband, father and employee of the off-planet mining corporate juggernaut 'Deep Space Mineral Retrieval'. Pilot your DSMR issued Mech to delve into the depths of planets, navigate perilous caverns and solve a multitude of puzzles to retrieve your quota of mineral resources and provide for your loving family back on Earth.

Though Max is just your average blue collar worker, he'll uncover much more than mineral deposits during this year's contracted expedition. Prepare to embark on a sci-fi adventure where every dig brings you closer to uncovering the truth buried under alien soil. What secrets are waiting to be UNEARTHED?

title: Super Jacked Up Tomato Face Johnson
description:
Super Jacked Up Tomato Face Johnson is a fast paced twitch platformer made for the Game Boy Color. There's a new protein shake fresh on the shelves and Tomato Face Johnson needs to bulk up! It's on the pricey side of course, but luckily, it's on sale for a limited time...

Time to get speedy!

Collect all the coins to complete levels. Complete levels super fast and you will earn enough stars to progress to the next world.
cover_image_alt: Promotional image for Super Jacked Up Tomato Face Johnson

title: The Ungrateful Son
description:
Back in January of 2022, Robert Dorman released a video on Art Carts. He asked the question "What would a book look like on a Game Boy". I was inspired by this thought and the end result is this - "The Ungrateful Son" by the Brothers Grimm, adapted for the Game Boy.

The Game Boy itself has a form factor similar to a small book, and I was interested in seeing how I could present long strings of text in a way that wasn't difficult to comprehend. I was drawn to the Brother's Grimm fairy tales when deciding what to create. The stories are reasonably short which suits the handheld and they allow for illustrations which serve to break up the text and offer a moment to rest between reading. They also contain themes and imagery that will excite children while still engaging adults. This was important to me because the Game Boy is a console that has been enjoyed by all ages since its release and I felt it's important to make sure the story caters to that same wide demographic.

The story is intended for use with the Game Boy (download the ROM below and flash to a cart or similar) or the Analogue Pocket (.pocket file available to download below).

I hope you enjoy The Ungrateful Son,
- Tom (Gumpy Function)
cover_image_alt: Promotional image for The Ungrateful Son

title: Dicee!
description: Dicee! is dice puzzle game for the Game Boy and Game Boy Color.

title: CAPPIMON
description: CAPPIMON is an RPG/Platformer hybrid for the Game Boy Color. Inspired by but antithetical to the Pokemon series, this is a very short proof of concept demo for the game.

title: Knit-Wit
description:
Knit-Wit is a push block puzzle game in the style of Nintendo's Game Boy Color.

Puzzle your way through 15 levels as you find enough wool to knit each of your family members a warm jumper and stave off the winter chills.

title: CUPID
description: Something or someone has broken the Heart, a magical relic that stitches all things together. Without it, the universe will slowly unravel and everything will fall into darkness. Play as a cute little Cupid, tasked with mending the broken Heart. Do your best to spread love and happiness to all that you meet and prevent the darkness from taking hold!

title: Super Dassalo Land
description:
Tommy Dassalo is busily preparing for the cultural event of the millennium: the taping of his stand-up comedy special ‘SCAM ARTIST’. All of a sudden, Jiko, an evil phantom, appears and traps him inside the pages of his notebook! 

Now it’s up to Tommy and his crusty little yappy dog Kewpie to travel across three worlds, piecing together his stand-up material and using his microphone whip, ground pound and wall jump to defeat Jiko’s minions and save comedy! 

PLEASE NOTE: Super Dassalo Land features crude humour and may not be suitable for kids.

title: Feed IT Souls: DUAL
description: Feed IT Souls: Dual is a fighting game for the Game Boy Color, designed for two players sharing one console.
cover_image_alt: Promotional image for Feed IT Souls: DUAL

title: Feed IT Souls: DOME Edition
description:
You are the offspring of IT, a bio-technological monstrosity after only one thing - delicious souls! Seek out and retrieve souls to feed your master. His power is your power. Every soul retrieved will enhance your mobility as you explore your surroundings.
        
        Feed IT Souls: Department Of Martian Efficiency Edition is an anti-X, anti-Musk, all-round anti-Techno Feudalist metroidvania for the Game Boy Color and remake of the GB Compo 23 game jam version from top to bottom.
cover_image_alt: Promotional image for Feed IT Souls: DOME Edition

title: Feed IT Souls
description: You are the offspring of IT, a bio-technological monstrosity after only one thing - delicious souls! Seek out and retrieve souls to feed your master. His power is your power, and every soul retrieved will enhance your mobility as you explore your surroundings
cover_image_alt: Promotional image for Feed IT Souls

title: Virtual BMO
description:
Turn your Game Boy or Analogue Pocket into Adventure Time's lovable walking handheld console with Virtual BMO!

I made this for my daughter and thought I would share with any of the Adventure Time fans out there. Just place the downloadable Game Boy ROM  onto a writable Game Boy cartridge or similar or download the .pocket file for Analogue Pocket users and you're away! Or, if you just want to have a look, play here in the browser.

Change Beemo's expression at will or browse his desktop to find all sorts of surprises. There is now a playable game to be found on the desktop too!

title: Lee Carvallo's Putting Challenge II
description:
Hi-D-Ho Gamerinos!  

André & Wally Productions present Lee Carvallo's Putting Challenge 2, a sequel to the wholly unsuccessful, critically panned golfing simulator released back in 1995. 

In this Point & Click Adventure, you play as Lee Carvallo. Puzzle your way through a series of events in his life. Sleep where he sleeps, eat what he eats, golf where he golfs!
cover_image_alt: Lee Carvallo's Putting Challenge II Cover Art

title: My Dinner with André
description:
Hi-D-Ho Gamerinos!

My Dinner with André is a Simpsons Fan Game inspired by the Noise Land Video Arcade game featured in the episode 'Boy Scoutz 'n the Hood' from Season 5.

Join actors André Gregory and Wallace Shawn at the dinner table as they discuss the important matters of life. Choose from three separate retorts as you progress through an approximately 10 minute long discussion created in the spirit of Louis Malle's 1981 comedy film of the same name.
cover_image_alt: My Dinner with André Cover Art

title: DVD-Logo Screensaver
description:
Relive the glory days of boring meeting rooms of yesteryear with
the DVD logo Screensaver - now for Game Boy!
You'll be the envy of everyone in your cubicle pod!*
Flash it on a cart, or experience the nostalgia in your favorite emulator!

*Your cubicle pod may not have envious people, or any other people, in which case, this would be an untrue statement.

title: Monster Orc-Arina
description:
A pick-up-and-play instrument is hard to come by on the Game Boy™, as most music carts are complex DAW-type systems with many options. Monster Orc-arina means to remedy that by giving anyone the ability to create music and have some fun in the process. 

Since the built-in note indicator shows you the note you are about to or are currently playing, it can also be useful to mock up melodies to then translate to hUGETracker or GBT Player.

title: Knucklebones
description:
Rules 

Each player takes their turn rolling the die and selecting a column to place it. If the die matches any dice on the other side, they are removed and their points are removed from that player's score. 

The game ends when either side fills up with dice. The winner is determined by total points on their side of the board. If both scores match, the game ends in a Tie.
Points

Points are accumulated by placing and creating combos in a column. Each die is worth its face value. Combos are worth the total value of the dice times the size of the combo.

title: Little Nemo: The Slumberland Hero DEMO
description:
When Nemo's friend Flip discovers the true power of dreams, his mischievous side gets the best of him and he puts his trust in a mysterious force to give him more power. Soon, Flip wields and quickly loses control of this magic, letting it out into the dream world, twisting good dreams and turning them into nightmares.

Join Nemo as he returns to Slumberland to put an end to nightmares once and for all with the help of the Morning Star, the scepter entrusted to him by King Morpheus, and other dream-made weapons of power. Experience the joy of playing through whimsical levels such as the Sugar Surplus, where candy and treats come to life, and many more! 

Defeat the nightmares, return Slumberland to peace and happiness once more, and prove yourself as the Slumberland hero!
cover_image_alt: Promotional image for Little Nemo: The Slumberland Hero DEMO

title: Grimace's Birthday
description:
In Grimace's Birthday, Grimace throws his birthday party at McDonald's, but some of his best McDonaldland friends — Birdie the Early Bird, the Hamburglar, and the McNugget Buddies — are missing! With only 30 minutes to spare, Grimace needs to find them before it's too late!

Help Grimace find his missing friends in time to blow the candles out, and collect enough birthday shakes for his guests along the way. Immerse yourself in Grimace’s world as he races around classic McDonald’s birthday scenes to find his pals all in a quest to save his birthday!

title: Tempus Gear DEMO
description: In Tempus Gear, you play Jupiter Cogswell, a mechanic and the owner of the Gilded Gear repair shop. Explore and uncover the mystery of a stolen keepsake, an underground conspiracy, and what may be the end of the world as we know it. Jump into the action and solve puzzles to reveal the truth behind the steam-fueled city of Ignis Cadere.
cover_image_alt: Promotional image for Tempus Gear DEMO

title: In The Dark 2
description: A deadly virus is corrupting the Federation’s neural network, threatening to isolate the galaxy. As Captain Ikalo Pann, follow cryptic clues, solve intricate puzzles, and explore alien worlds to stop the spread and uncover a deep sci-fi mystery.
cover_image_alt: In The Dark 2 Box and Cartridge

title: In The Dark
description:
It was a simple mission: Investigate an unidentified distress signal from a cruiser-class ship orbiting a barren planet in the Rigel system. Ikalo Pann, the Captain of the Star Leviathan, navigated through the debris surrounding the derelict ship until it was within scanner range. A scan of the ship pinged with no purchase for organics, life support systems were still functional, but losing power.

With no signs of life coming from the vessel, they feared the worst but proceeded to dock with the airlock and climb aboard. Upon entering the main deck, they noticed the warped sound of a klaxon going off, echoing down the halls. Ikalo signaled to her crew to follow her further into the ship towards the living quarters. As they entered the next room, the warning alarm suddenly stopped and the doors behind them shut tight, followed by the grinding gears of a locking mechanism.

The display on a monitor in the middle of the room came to life, a cursor pulsed rhythmically, illuminating the Captain's surroundings with a soft neon green glow. Suddenly, a pattern of lights animated on the monitor, and as they came to rest, a puzzle appeared over the on-screen grid. It was clear that this was all tied to the ship. They had fallen into a trap! There was only one hope - solve the puzzles to bypass the locks... and as the power continued to drain from what little remained of the backup power and life support systems, it was only a matter of time before they succumbed to their fate.
cover_image_alt: Promotional image for In The Dark

title: Tales of Monsterland DX
description: Save a village besieged by monsters by uncovering their origin. Run, jump, and battle through a magical world while gaining new abilities. Inspired by classic 8-bit platformers, it’s a fast-paced adventure with charm and challenge.
cover_image_alt: Promotional image for Tales of Monsterland DX

title: Tales of Monsterland
description: Save a village besieged by monsters by uncovering their origin. Run, jump, and battle through a magical world while gaining new abilities. Inspired by classic 8-bit platformers, it’s a fast-paced adventure with charm and challenge.
cover_image_alt: Tales of Monsterland Box and Cartridge

title: Neon Nova
description: TBD

title: Legacy of Verintia
description:
Welcome to Verintia!

Legacy of Verintia is an open-world fantasy RPG for the original Game Boy developed in 2023. The game lets players choose their own path. As you can earn experience points from every meaningful action, you can make progress in whichever way you want – help the local townsfolk, hunt monsters and sell their materials, collect and sell ingredients, help out on a farm, go fishing or play a card game at the local pub.

title: Ghost of the Arcade
description:
- 5 different monster-related arcade games
- A story full of dark humor and gaming references
- 32 collectible figures to get from a gacha machine
- Arcade Mode: Just play the arcade games without the story
cover_image_alt: Ghost of the Arcade Cover Art

title: Capybara Village
description:
- Enjoy the serene Capybara Village
- Go on explorations to find items
- Sell items to local shops
- Buy / find new costumes for your capybara
- Buy / find new furniture for your home

title: MY FRIENDLY LITTLE ISLAND DELUXE
description: My Friendly Little Island Deluxe is a cute game about personal growth and making friends. It starts out as a slow, simplistic adventure game. However, with every new skill you unlock, the game’s dynamics change more and more into a fast-paced platformer.
cover_image_alt: My Friendly Little Island Deluxe Cover Art

title: Buck and the Cursed Cartridge
description: When Buck, a die-hard retro gamer, buys a mysterious cartridge labeled “DEFINITELY NOT A CURSED CARTRIDGE” from his local GameStop, things go sideways fast. The moment he pops it into his Chromatic, he’s sucked through the screen and trapped inside the game! To escape, Buck must battle through pixelated worlds, outsmart glitchy bosses, and uncover who—or what—is pulling the strings. With help from a rogue hacker, hidden cheats, and his trusty blaster, Buck’s only way out is to beat the game itself.
cover_image_alt: Buck and the Cursed Cartridge Box and Cartridge

title: Doomslinger Dungeon
description: Play as the Doomslinger, a mysterious gunslinger. Venture into a creepy dungeon and defeat all kinds of spooky monsters like ghosts, zombies and pumpkin monsters.

title: Press "A" to Get Up
description: It's, uhh.... It's about Executive Dysfunction.
cover_image_alt: Promotional image for Press "A" to Get Up

title: The Death of Me
description: Step into the shoes of an unlucky chronic illness patient in "The Death of Me": A medical-horror inspired by real life experiences battling the complexities of day-to-day life with mental and physical illnesses.
cover_image_alt: The Death of Me Cover Art

title: Bat-Son's Nightmare Demo
description:
Bat-Son is finally getting his own game! What? Nobody asked for that? Well... here it is anyway.

Prepare to explore a dungeon where danger isn't just a probability - it's a guarantee. Can you navigate Bat-Son to safety and unlock the final gate, or will you succumb to death time and time again, forever leaving the mysteries of the nightmare unsolved?
cover_image_alt: Promotional image for Bat-Son's Nightmare Demo

title: Batty Zabella 2 XOXO XMAS
description:
Batty's back for a Christmas-themed adventure! Don't expect a typical holiday season, though - there are still plenty of creepy, crawly things lurking in her home.

Explore Batty's home using the arrow keys. Important items will often be displayed with a sparkle effect. Depending on the context, players may need to press up or down to interact with objects in a scene.
cover_image_alt: Promotional image for Batty Zabella 2 XOXO XMAS

title: Batty Zabella
description:
Batty Zabella is a point-and-click horror comedy designed to push the limits of outdated hardware, and provide a compelling experience even by 2022 standards.

It also marks the debut of a new horror icon; Batty Zabella! Help save her family and rid her home of phantoms. She may give you sass while doing it, but you'll love it.

title: Soul Void
description: Soul Void is a short, 1-3 hour experience made in the style of a gameboy-era game. Explore the odd landscapes of the void, help lost souls you find along the way, and face your inner demons as you attempt to find a way home.

title: He Fucked The Girl Out of Me
description: A game about sex work and trauma.

opinions.author: Viv Slakes
opinions.body: The developer uses this game to tell a very difficult, personal story. The game can be quite hard to stomach and the trigger warnings the game provides should not be ignored.

cover_image_alt: Promotional image for He Fucked The Girl Out of Me
